case_title: CONARD HOUSE, INCORPORATED VS. DUC LUU et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LUU, DUC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CONARD HOUSE, INCORPORATED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUU, DUC THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 150 9TH ST., #119, CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, LEASE FORFEITED, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT***SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT LUU, DUC
DECLARATION RE: OF AUTHENTICITY OF LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONARD HOUSE, INCORPORATED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONARD HOUSE, INCORPORATED AS TO DEFENDANT LUU, DUC
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONARD HOUSE, INCORPORATED AS TO DEFENDANT LUU, DUC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONARD HOUSE, INCORPORATED SERVED MAY-22-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUU, DUC
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONARD HOUSE, INCORPORATED AS TO DEFENDANT LUU, DUC DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT LUU, DUC
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $17.40 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONARD HOUSE, INCORPORATED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT LUU, DUC
